channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: China Will Require Meta to Unwind Acquisition of AI Start-Up Manus
item.description: The impact of the ruling was not immediately clear, but it could send a chilling signal to Chinese tech founders seeking to team up with foreign companies.
item.dc:creator: Meaghan Tobin

media:content.media:credit: Jason Henry for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Meta has described the two teams already as “deeply integrated.”
